title: incarvillea compacta
intro: Incarvillea compacta, also known as the Chinese fagret flower or compact incarvillea, is a flowering plant species in the bignonia family (Bignoniaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Incarvillea compacta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy. Incarvillea compacta is often prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments.
